title: carex × xanthocarpa
intro: Carex × xanthocarpa, also known as the yellow-fruited sedge, is a hybrid plant species within the Carex genus, characterized by its distinctive yellowish-colored fruit and its unique growth habits. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carex × xanthocarpa include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often consumed for their medicinal and health-promoting effects.
